title: Glass Cannon
description: A custom challenge where you deal massive damage at the cost of only having half a heart
body:
# Glass Cannon

This custom challenge gives you an insane damage output, making you capable of killing everything in just one hit. On the other hand, you own health is limited to half a heart, which means that the same applies to you as well. The intended goal for this data pack is to defeat the ender dragon, though of course you may use it for whatever you have in mind.

This data pack was originally made for version 1.16, but it still works up to 1.20.2 (and probably later versions if you're reading this in the future).
